name: Valve Rotary
explanation: A full organ rotary-speaker chain fed by an overdriven tube preamp. A warm valve stage with grid bias adds second-harmonic warmth that grows into a growl as Drive rises, then feeds a twin-rotor rotating speaker: the signal is split into a bass-rotor and a treble horn band, each spun through its own virtual driver for amplitude tremolo plus a short Doppler pitch vibrato. The horn turns faster than the drum in opposite phase, and Speed morphs slow chorale to fast tremolo with inertia so the rotors ramp rather than jump. Controls: Speed, Drive, Depth, Tone and dry/wet Mix.
